_note: Snapshot of Claude Code skills available in this session. Each skill has an `enabled` boolean — flip to false to mark a skill you don't want to use on DealScout. This file is informational; it doesn't actually disable skills in the harness (that's done via settings.json / plugin config).

core.name: update-config
core.description: Configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json (hooks, permissions, env vars).

core.name: simplify
core.description: Review changed code for reuse, quality, efficiency; fix issues found.

core.name: fewer-permission-prompts
core.description: Scan transcripts and add prioritized allowlist to .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.

core.name: loop
core.description: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval, or let the model self-pace.

core.name: schedule
core.description: Create, update, list, or run scheduled remote agents (routines) on a cron schedule.

core.name: claude-api
core.description: Build, debug, optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps; includes prompt caching and version migrations.

core.name: Frontend
core.description: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces; avoids generic AI aesthetics.

core.name: init
core.description: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation.

core.name: security-review
core.description: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch.

superpowers.name: superpowers:using-superpowers
superpowers.description: Establishes how to find and use skills. Invoked at conversation start.

superpowers.name: superpowers:brainstorming
superpowers.description: Use before any creative work — explores intent, requirements, and design before implementation.

superpowers.name: superpowers:writing-plans
superpowers.description: Use when you have a spec/requirements for a multi-step task, before touching code.

superpowers.name: superpowers:executing-plans
superpowers.description: Execute a written plan in a separate session with review checkpoints.

superpowers.name: superpowers:subagent-driven-development
superpowers.description: Execute implementation plans with independent tasks in the current session.

superpowers.name: superpowers:dispatching-parallel-agents
superpowers.description: Use when facing 2+ independent tasks with no shared state or sequential dependency.

superpowers.name: superpowers:test-driven-development
superpowers.description: Use when implementing any feature/bugfix, before writing implementation code.

superpowers.name: superpowers:systematic-debugging
superpowers.description: Use for any bug, test failure, or unexpected behavior, before proposing fixes.

superpowers.name: superpowers:verification-before-completion
superpowers.description: Require running verification commands and confirming output before claiming work complete.

superpowers.name: superpowers:requesting-code-review
superpowers.description: Verify work meets requirements before merging.

superpowers.name: superpowers:receiving-code-review
superpowers.description: Use when receiving review feedback — requires technical rigor, not performative agreement.

superpowers.name: superpowers:using-git-worktrees
superpowers.description: Ensure an isolated workspace exists when starting feature work needing isolation.

superpowers.name: superpowers:finishing-a-development-branch
superpowers.description: Guides completion of dev work with structured options for merge, PR, or cleanup.

superpowers.name: superpowers:writing-skills
superpowers.description: Use when creating, editing, or verifying skills before deployment.

commit-commands.name: commit-commands:commit-push-pr
commit-commands.description: Commit, push, and open a PR.

commit-commands.name: commit-commands:clean_gone
commit-commands.description: Clean up local branches marked [gone] and associated worktrees.

pr-review-toolkit.name: pr-review-toolkit:review-pr
pr-review-toolkit.description: Comprehensive PR review using specialized agents.

feature-dev.name: feature-dev:feature-dev
feature-dev.description: Guided feature development with codebase understanding and architecture focus.

hookify.name: hookify:hookify
hookify.description: Create hooks to prevent unwanted behaviors from conversation analysis or instructions.

hookify.name: hookify:configure
hookify.description: Enable or disable hookify rules interactively.

hookify.name: hookify:help
hookify.description: Get help with the hookify plugin.

hookify.name: hookify:writing-rules
hookify.description: Guidance on hookify rule syntax and patterns.

agent-auth.name: agent-auth:agent-auth
agent-auth.description: Integrate Scalekit Agent Auth into a project (OAuth flows, token storage/refresh for Gmail, Slack, Notion, Calendar).

agent-auth.name: agent-auth:building-agent-mcp-server
agent-auth.description: Guides creating a Scalekit MCP server with authenticated tool access.

agent-auth.name: agent-auth:production-readiness-scalekit
agent-auth.description: Structured production readiness checklist for Scalekit agent auth implementations.

frontend-design.name: frontend-design:frontend-design
frontend-design.description: Guidance for distinctive, intentional visual design when building or reshaping UI.

ralph-wiggum.name: ralph-wiggum:ralph-loop
ralph-wiggum.description: Start Ralph Wiggum loop in current session.

ralph-wiggum.name: ralph-wiggum:help
ralph-wiggum.description: Explain Ralph Wiggum technique and available commands.

mgrep.name: mgrep:mgrep
mgrep.description: Replacement for built-in WebSearch/Grep/Glob; use `mgrep --web` for web searches.
